description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: checkoutbuildwindows and checkoutbuildubuntu. The checkoutbuildwindows job runs on a windows-latest environment, checks out the repository, and uses MSBuild to build a Visual Studio solution. The checkoutbuildubuntu job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, installs LLVM, fixes up Makefiles, and builds the project using Make.
